description:
§17.1.1 — an element carrying `else` with NO preceding `if=`/`else-if=` element at the same parent level fires E-CTRL-001. Mirrors the SPEC's own §17 Worked Example 2 (`Fallback` after a plain `

`). W-PROGRAM-001 co-fires incidentally (no `` shell around the bare markup); E-DG-002 co-fires incidentally (the `` cell has no surviving reader) — neither is asserted.
rationale: §17.1.1 Normative Rules: an element carrying `else` SHALL be immediately preceded at the same parent level by an element carrying `if=` or `else-if=`. The compiler SHALL reject any `else` attribute that does not satisfy this condition (E-CTRL-001). §17 Error Code Summary + §34 both register E-CTRL-001 at severity Error.
